query:
SELECT p.batch_no, se.id AS station_event_id, se.stationCode AS station_code, se.operatorUserId AS operator_user_id, se.businessDate AS business_date, se.countForProductivity AS count_for_productivity, psd.id AS productivity_detail_id, psd.userId AS detail_user_id, psd.businessDate AS detail_business_date, psd.pointsAwarded AS points_awarded
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN station_events se ON se.productId = p.id AND se.stationEventType = 'complete'
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
WHERE p.batch_no IN ('500025007','500025004','500024968','500025035','500025029')
ORDER BY p.batch_no, se.stationCode, se.id;
